In the original code, adding the offset to the instant makes sense because the offset is the number of milliseconds to add to get UTC time from local time. But in the mutant, multiplying by the offset would be incorrect unless the offset is 1 or -1, which it's not. This change likely caused miscalculations in various date/time operations, leading to test failures.
